MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth MacDonald for plaintiff Fireside Bank. No other appearance.
Hearing held. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any funds/earnings held to judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
